title: The ultimate Eid Al Fitr 2026 gift: Abu Dhabi approves AED4.21 billion housing support for 2,652 citizens
summary_full: Abu Dhabi has approved a AED4.21 billion housing package for 2,652 Emirati citizens ahead of Eid Al Fitr 2026. The initiative, approved by H.H. Sheikh Khaled bin Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, includes housing loans, grants, land allocations, and repayment exemptions. This move aims to strengthen family stability and improve living standards across the emirate.
